vocab.data: useFetch() for SSR-aware data fetching. useAsyncData() for custom async logic. pending/error/data destructuring.
vocab.api: Server routes in server/api/*.ts. defineEventHandler with getQuery, readBody, createError helpers.
vocab.authentication: nuxt-auth-utils: useUserSession() composable. requireUserSession() server-side guard.
vocab.loading: useLazyFetch() for deferred loading. Nuxt's built-in loading bar. NuxtLoadingIndicator component.
vocab.state: useState() composable for SSR-safe shared state. Pinia for complex stores with useStore() pattern.
